faqs.question: Can I combine a state SPAP with Medicare Part D in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Alabama does not have a state SPAP, but you can combine Medicare Part D with manufacturer patient assistance programs and GoodRx-style discount cards when a particular prescription is not on your plan's formulary.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in Alabama?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov/extrahelp, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office. Alabama State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP) counselors can help Alabama residents at no cost.

faqs.question: What should Arkansas seniors do during the Medicare Part D coverage gap?
faqs.answer: The Part D coverage gap has largely been reformed; in 2026, out-of-pocket Part D costs are capped at $2,000 annually. Arkansas seniors who hit the cap pay $0 for covered drugs the rest of the year. Ask your Part D plan or Arkansas Senior Health Insurance Information Program (SHIIP) to verify how the cap applies to your plan.

faqs.question: Who qualifies for Medicare Extra Help in Kentucky?
faqs.answer: In 2026, Medicare Extra Help (the Part D Low-Income Subsidy) is available to Kentucky residents with income under $22,590 (individual) or $30,660 (couple) and resources under $17,220 (individual) or $34,360 (couple). Full Extra Help reduces Part D premiums to $0 and caps copays.

faqs.question: What should Michigan seniors do during the Medicare Part D coverage gap?
faqs.answer: The Part D coverage gap has largely been reformed; in 2026, out-of-pocket Part D costs are capped at $2,000 annually. Michigan seniors who hit the cap pay $0 for covered drugs the rest of the year. Ask your Part D plan or Michigan Medicare/Medicaid Assistance Program (MMAP) to verify how the cap applies to your plan.

faqs.question: Who qualifies for Medicare Extra Help in South Dakota?
faqs.answer: In 2026, Medicare Extra Help (the Part D Low-Income Subsidy) is available to South Dakota residents with income under $22,590 (individual) or $30,660 (couple) and resources under $17,220 (individual) or $34,360 (couple). Full Extra Help reduces Part D premiums to $0 and caps copays.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in South Dakota?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov/extrahelp, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office. South Dakota SHIINE counselors can help South Dakota residents at no cost.

faqs.question: What should Texas seniors do during the Medicare Part D coverage gap?
faqs.answer: The Part D coverage gap has largely been reformed; in 2026, out-of-pocket Part D costs are capped at $2,000 annually. Texas seniors who hit the cap pay $0 for covered drugs the rest of the year. Ask your Part D plan or Texas HICAP (SHIP) to verify how the cap applies to your plan.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in Texas?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov/extrahelp, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office. Texas HICAP (SHIP) counselors can help Texas residents at no cost.
